.button {
  align-self: stretch;
  padding-left: 16px;
  padding-right: 16px;
  padding-top: 10px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  background: #0032A0;
  border-radius: 40px;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  display: inline-flex;
}

.button_01 {
  align-self: stretch;
  padding-left: 16px;

  padding-top: 10px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;

  gap: 4px;
  display: inline-flex;
}
